<!-- Thanks for the PR! Quick checklist before submitting -->

## What does this PR change?

<!-- Brief summary, 1-3 sentences. -->

## Which files / sections are affected?

<!-- Reference §-numbers for design-doc changes, file paths for system / chain notes,
     and link the related issue if there is one. -->

## What kind of contribution is this?

- [ ] Typo / formatting / broken link fix
- [ ] Documentation expansion (new system note, new chain note, research summary)
- [ ] Design refinement (changes interpretation of an existing principle or system)
- [ ] Other (describe)

## If this is a design refinement: have you opened an issue first?

<!-- Per CONTRIBUTING.md, major design changes go through issue discussion before PR.
     If this is just a typo or content addition, ignore this. -->

## Foundational-principle check

<!-- Does this PR touch any of the foundational principles?
     - Nature is the antagonist
     - No dominant strategy
     - Variance, not randomness
     - Mechanical behavior, not scripted narrative
     - Diegetic UI, no overlays
     - Skill is debuff-removal, not bonus-stacking

     If yes, note which and how the PR is consistent with the principle. -->

## Anything I should know before reviewing?

<!-- Anything unusual, contentious, or worth flagging.
     If nothing — leave blank or say "nope." -->
